description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Release Linux that triggers on push events with any tag. Run a job named Release AppImage on an ubuntu-16.04 environment, checking out the code, initializing submodules, installing Qt, building the project with CMake, determining the version from the GitHub reference, creating an AppImage package, and archiving the full source code. Finally, use the action-gh-release action to create a draft pre-release with the AppImage and source archive, naming it CP Editor with the determined version.
